reference: YOU SURELY MUST HAVE A GIMLET YOU WILL MAKE A FEW HOLES HERE AND THERE AROUND MY MOUTH AND YOU WILL NAIL THE TOP PLANK ON LOOSELY GOOD AND WHAT IF YOU SHOULD HAPPEN TO COUGH OR TO SNEEZE
text: You surely must have a gimlet. You will make a few holes here and there around my mouth, and you will nail the top plank on loosely. Good, and what if you should happen to cough or to sneeze?
